services.name: LoxConvert - AI Customs Document Analyzer
services.description: Upload commercial invoices, packing lists, or bills of lading in any format. AI extracts structured data, classifies HS codes, calculates tariff rates, and flags compliance risks.

services.name: AI Lead Radar - B2B Buyer Discovery
services.description: AI-powered multi-step discovery wizard that finds and verifies real potential buyer companies based on your specific product and target markets. Each lead includes company details, contact info, match reasoning, and AI confidence score.

services.name: LOX Predict - Freight Rate Forecasting
services.description: 6-month container shipping rate forecasts with confidence intervals, trend analysis, multi-carrier route optimization, and AI-generated market insights.

services.name: LOXTR CRM - Trade Sales Automation
services.description: Purpose-built CRM for international trade featuring lead management (list/grid/kanban), AI email generation in any language, campaign automation, smart segments, and supply chain intelligence.

services.name: Industry Intelligence Pages
services.description: Specialized trade intelligence for 9 industries including Textile, Automotive, Chemicals, Food, Machinery, Medical, Construction, Electronics, and Cosmetics. Each includes HS code databases, compliance requirements, and buyer profiles.
